sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. RGB and CMYK confirmed from official NFL guidelines. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The Washington Commanders, formerly known as the Redskins, are an NFL franchise based in the Washington D.C. metropolitan area, founded in 1932. They play at Northwest Stadium and compete in the NFC East. The franchise won three Super Bowl championships in 1983, 1988, and 1992, and is one of the oldest teams in the NFL with a long history in the nation's capital.
